title: Beach Pomni / Bikini Pomni
about: Beach Pomni or Bikini Pomni refers to a series of memes, fan art and reactions to an image of the character Pomni from The Amazing Digital Circus wearing a striped bikini and wading in the ocean. The image of Pomni was first revealed in the thumbnail of the "Glitch Direct" livestream, which was set up on October 9th, 2025, and set to premiere on October 10th. The image went viral shortly after it went public, inspiring reactions, many of which thirst over Pomni, as well as fan art, Rule 34 imagery and memes depicting Pomni in the bikini.
origin:
On October 9th, 2025, the GLITCH YouTube[1] channel set up the livestream for their "Glitch Direct" event, where they will announce new information about their animated series, including The Amazing Digital Circus. The thumbnail for the stream features Pomni in a bikini wading in the ocean.

That day, X[2] user @lunefalls posted a screenshot of the thumbnail, writing, "POMNI AT THE BEACH HELLO??" garnering over 2,000 likes in a day.
